name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural food. Fully vaccinated and disease-free.

name: Shahiwal Mota Goru
description: Premium Shahiwal breed, very healthy and heavy. Ideal for large family Qurbani. Fed with organic grass and hay.

name: Australian Cross Bull
description: Massive Australian crossbreed bull, excellent for Qurbani. Very well-built body with top quality meat. Raised on premium feed.

name: Hariana Goru
description: Good quality Hariana breed cow from Rajshahi. Clean, healthy, and well-maintained. Great value for Qurbani.

name: Deshi Kalo Goru
description: Young healthy black deshi cow. Naturally raised without artificial feed. Affordable and perfect for small family Qurbani.

name: Shahi Deshi Khasi
description: Fat and healthy deshi khasi (castrated goat) perfect for Qurbani. Well-fed and vaccinated. Excellent meat quality.

name: Black Bengal Khasi
description: Famous Black Bengal breed khasi from Khulna. Renowned for its delicious and tender meat. A top choice for Qurbani.

name: Jamunapari Khasi
description: Large Jamunapari breed goat, one of the biggest goat breeds. High meat yield. Healthy and fully vaccinated.

name: Deshi Pathari Dum Bha
description: Healthy local sheep suitable for Qurbani. Naturally raised on green grass. Affordable option for small families.

name: Nili-Ravi Buffalo
description: Strong and heavy Nili-Ravi buffalo ideal for Qurbani. Very high meat yield. Well cared for and disease-free.

name: Brahman Cross Bull
description: Well-built Brahman crossbreed bull from Tangail. Excellent body structure and weight. Raised on premium supplementary feed.

name: Tazi Jaat Khasi
description: Premium Tazi/Beetal cross breed khasi from Chittagong. Exceptionally large and healthy. High-quality meat, great for Qurbani gatherings.
